uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

photoURL.description: The URL to the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: A productivity task created by the user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the task.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the task was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this task.

projectId.description: The ID of the project this task belongs to.

id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the project was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this project.

id.description: The unique identifier for the session.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the session was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this session.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A chat message between the user and the AI.

id.description: The unique identifier for the message.

content.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this message.

sessionId.description: The ID of the session this message belongs to.

/messages/{messageId}.description: Stores chat history for the user.
